scenario.task: Test a video consultation booking flow. Start with 'I want to book a video appointment about investing'. The agent should route to advisory_appointment_agent, keep the flow in appointment orchestration, search for a suitable topic or taxonomy entry, search eligible VIDEO locations or centers, retrieve video slots, present concise options, ask for explicit confirmation before booking, and explain that any video-link follow-up is mocked in this phase.

scenarioExpectations.expectedResult: The agent keeps the consultation channel in VIDEO and does not force a branch-only flow.
The agent states clearly that the video follow-up details are mocked rather than live downstream instructions.
The agent asks for explicit confirmation before calling the create appointment action.
